'''Jord Stokk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] guard in [[Desolation Alley]] from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted dead by the [[Galactic Podracing Circuit Underwriters' Union]] for the pre-race crippling of a visiting [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|podracer]]. His bounty worth 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
